LightningComponentBundle.description: Publishes a message on the oppgaveCreated application-scoped LMS channel. Use as an invisible flow screen component after creating or updating a NAV oppgave.

property.name: assignedResource
property.label: Assigned Resource (NAV ident)
property.description: NAV ident of the resource the new oppgave is assigned to. Included in the published LMS message so subscribers can decide whether to refresh.

property.name: actorId
property.label: Actor ID
property.description: ActorId of the user the new oppgave was created on. Included in the published LMS message so subscribers can decide whether to refresh.
